slides.title: A Decade of Digital Health
slides.subtitle: How Singapore quietly built — and then rebuilt — the region's most-copied EHR playbook

slides.quote: Every country wants a national health record. Few realize the real work is governance, not data models.

slides.title: A Quiet Decade of Plumbing
bullets: 2012: NEHR goes live — 6 clusters, shared record envisioned
2015: First real interoperability fights — whose data model wins?
2018: Legacy EHR vendors begin consolidating regional footprint

slides.title: Where the story began
slides.subtitle: The SingHealth server room, 2015 — 47 systems, 3 standards, one dream

slides.title: What Each Model Is Good At

tiers.label: TIER · TERTIARY
tiers.example: Epic-style mono-vendor rewards patience and scale

tiers.label: TIER · CLUSTER
tiers.example: Platform models let you swap modules without a rip-and-replace

tiers.label: TIER · COMMUNITY
tiers.example: Platform wins — deployment in months, not years

slides.title: The Thesis
slides.message: The next decade won't be about who owns the record. It will be about who can move intelligently on top of it.
slides.context: That's a different race — and one Singapore is built to lead.

slides.title: Continue the Story
slides.subtitle: Next issue drops in six weeks
